title: crocus albiflorus subsp. neapolitanus
intro: Crocus albiflorus subsp. neapolitanus, also known as the Naples crocus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant's bulbs can be used to make herbal preparations, such as tinctures and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
